raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declaration of personal values prioritizing internal authenticity",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "an 'inner Function' exists as a valid source of living",
    "outer performance is separable from and inferior to inner Function",
    "rhythm and rule are meaningfully opposed priorities",
    "difference, slowness, and depth are chosen states one can embody",
    "'being' is distinct from and preferable to proving"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as poetic contrast; binary oppositions are sustained without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "reader seeks self-reflection or permission to value subjective experience over external metrics, and treats language as evocative rather than prescriptive",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "taken as literal ontology, used to evade accountability, or presented as universally applicable truth rather than personal stance"
}
